changes.old: We watched the workers employed in the manufacture of cartridges emerge from the gateway
changes.new: We watched the brutally satisfied workers employed in the manufacture of cartridges emerge from the gateway
changes.reason: Restores dropped ironic qualifier 'brutalmente paghi' (the deliberate 'brutalmente…brutalmente' doubling); pago = satisfied/content per Edgren 1901 ('pago, ADJ.: satisfied (pleased)') and Zingarelli 1922 (soddisfatto), so 'satisfied' over the audit's 'compliant'.
changes.context_sentence: stood a hedge of Guards. We watched the brutally satisfied workers employed in the manufacture of cartridges emerge from the gateway two by two, four by four
